name: Patient Case
history: History of family conflict with a dismissive and unsupportive father. Estrangement from the father. Ongoing stress related to partner's family, including a difficult relationship with the partner's sister-in-law.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I assert myself, I will be rejected or dismissed.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't change how others treat me, so there's no point in trying.
coping_strategies: Avoid confrontation and suppress feelings to prevent conflict.
situation: Deciding how to address rude behavior from the partner's sister-in-law and whether to set boundaries.
auto_thought: If I set boundaries, they will reject me.
behavior: Avoids addressing the issue directly and remains passive.
